programmes.show_description: Turkey, Taters And Dogs. Guy digs into a mashup of flavours, including a potato-centric palace dishing out hearty Brazilian specialties and a deli serving latkes and turkey pastrami. S26, Ep12
Burgers, Beef And Barbecue. Guy Fieri samples beef and barbecue in Florida and California, including a Vietnamese spot serving up tasty pho and a BBQ joint making a twist on lasagne. S26, Ep13
Jersey Shore. Adam is at the Jersey Shore checking out a Trenton-style tomato pie and mighty octopus-shaped ice cream sundae. Then, he tries an insanely spicy wing-eating challenge. S2, Ep32
Syracuse. Adam Richman is in Syracuse, NY, checking out some serious grub. He tries the pork-sket sandwich at a biker BBQ joint. Then he takes on a monumental frittata challenge. S2, Ep33
6-Foot Sub Sandwich, Zeppoles & A Sick Mauro. There is a hero at the bakery and it's not Buddy, but rather a mega Six-Foot Hero Sandwich Cake for a local deli's 100th birthday party. S3, Ep10
Color, Camouflage & Cupcake Day. War breaks out when Buddy and the Carlo gang are challenged to show off their shooting skills in order to make a scrummy paintball cake. S3, Ep11

programmes.show_description: Fast And Fresh. Tom gets a delivery of Isle of Wight tomatoes for an iconic dish that is back on the menu. Plus, she shares three fast, fresh dishes to cook at home. S2, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Spice Route. In the pub, a traditional shepherd's pie is given an Indian twist. Plus, Tom cooks lamb curry, Thai fishcakes and spiced pineapple tarte tatin. S2, Ep8
Dave Myers and Si King explore the food of the American South. They start in Memphis, Tennessee, where they try iconic Southern dishes: a soul stew and fried chicken. S1, Ep1

Home Sweet Home: Italian-ish. Ree cooks up ranch-style Italian helped by her kid crew. There's chicken Florentine mac and cheese, and squash spaghetti for a healthy bolognese. S25, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Mushroom Soup/Cauliflower Remoulade. Jamie takes mushrooms to a whole new level with his deliciously cheesy baked mushroom soup. Plus, he makes a stunning cauliflower remoulade. S1, Ep13

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Jamie cooks his incredible avocado pastry quiche, with a delicious cheesy and basil filling. Plus, he shares how to take steak to the next level. S1, Ep14
Cook Like A Pro. Ina shares some of her top-tips that she learnt as a professional chef. She makes a classic lemon chicken breast dish and a mouth-watering sticky toffee date cake. S4, Ep7
Easy Desserts. Ina makes easy sweet treats like her delicious fruit-filled cranberry and apple cake. Plus, she gets a dessert masterclass from pastry chef, Claudia Fleming. S4, Ep8
12 of the UK's best amateur bakers compete to be crowned the Great British Bake Off champion. The technical challenge sees them all making a coffee and walnut Battenberg cake. S2, Ep1

James Martin sails into Chania, Crete, to explore the local markets and pick out some traditional produce. On the menu is his version of chicken souvlaki. S1, Ep9
Chef James Martin arrives in Minori on Italy's stunning Amalfi coast. During his trip, James learns how to make delicious fresh pasta and shares a beautiful recipe. S1, Ep10

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: James is in Virginia to learn the secrets of an all-American classic, the apple pie. Then, he heads to the kitchen to make his own apple crumble cake. S1, Ep1

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America

Bologna. Adam's in Bologna tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including Bolognese sauce and a sweet made with rice and almonds. S1, Ep7
Naples. Adam's in Naples tasting iconic foods named after this city, including the classic Napolitina pizza and a pasta dish called spaghetti alle vongole. S1, Ep8
Chicken Trifecta. Guy Fieri hits the road for top chicken dinners. In Hawaii visits Mick Fleetwood's restaurant and he checks out a California hot dog spot's chicken and waffles. S26, Ep14
From Spicy To Icy. Guy Fieri heats up with spice and cools off with ice! He visits a hot BBQ joint in California, a Cajun spot in Virginia and a Hawaiian place's tropical shaved ice. S26, Ep15
Island And Desert. Guy Fieri hunts desert and island flavour. He enjoys nostalgic breakfast tarts at a café in California and fish and chips at a gluten-free spot in Hawaii. S26, Ep16
Soakin' Up Maui. Guy Fieri cruises Maui, Hawaii, with his buddy chef Reno Henriques for regional favourites such as moco and kalbi ribs, food truck fare and St. Louis-style barbecue. S25, Ep1
Portland, ME. Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, Maine. He samples lobster right out of the pot and some of the best coastal views imaginable. S2, Ep34
Niagara Falls. Adam gets romantic at Niagara Falls. Adam has a date with a steak that barely fits on a plate. Then he crosses the border for the Italian Challenge. S2, Ep35
Key To The City & A Key-Tar Cake. Buddy is in for a blast from the past when he is asked to make a retro cake for an 80's tribute band. Plus, he is given the key to his birthplace. S3, Ep12
Barbers & Bulls. It is the anniversary of the barbershop where Buddy's been getting his hair cut since he was a kid and he wants to make them a cake they won't forget. Will he cut it? S3, Ep13
